heading: Forest Service and Bureau of Land Management temporary special recreation permits for outfitting and guiding
label: 8545 Forest Service and Bureau of Land Management temporary special recreation permits for outfitting and guiding
notes: References in TextAs amended by this title, referred to in subsec. (d), means as amended by title III of .Pub. L. 118–234
amendments: References in TextAs amended by this title, referred to in subsec. (d), means as amended by title III of .Pub. L. 118–234

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , the Secretary concerned shall establish and implement a program to authorize the issuance of temporary special recreation permits for new or additional recreational uses of Federal recreational land and water managed by the Forest Service and the Bureau of Land Management.January 4, 2025

children.heading: Term of temporary permits
children.label: b Term of temporary permits
children.text: A temporary special recreation permit issued under paragraph (1) shall be issued for a period of not more than 2 years.1So in original. Probably should be “subsection (a)”.1

children.heading: Conversion to long-term permit
children.label: c Conversion to long-term permit
children.text: If the Secretary concerned determines that a permittee under paragraph (1) has completed 2 years of satisfactory operation under the permit proposed to be converted, the Secretary may provide for the conversion of a temporary special recreation permit issued under paragraph (1) to a long-term special recreation permit.11

children.heading: Effect
children.label: d Effect
children.text: Nothing in this subsection alters or affects the authority of the Secretary to issue a special recreation permit under subsection (h)(1) of (as amended by this title).2section 6802 of this titleSo in original. Probably should be “this section”.2
